title: feat: bill Perplexity/Gemini search fees as itemized billing adjustments
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds declarative \`billing.adjustments\` to the registry (trimmed #11683 base): Perplexity request fees (tier-pinned $5/$12/$14 per 1k by alias, provider-reported \`request_cost\` preferred) and Gemini grounding (2.5: $35/1k grounded prompts, web-evidence predicate; 3.x: $14/1k search queries, stream-dedup)
- Clamp-and-alert provider-cost policy: absent → static fee + WARN (Perplexity-regression detector), malformed or >10× → static fee + ERROR; never 502s
- Single-pass \`calculateUsageBilling\`: cost, price, and per-rule breakdown from one rule walk
- Events: \`adjustment_costs\` / \`adjustment_units\` Map columns keyed by versioned rule id (\`DEFAULT map()\` — old rows correct, no backfill); one row per request unchanged
- One uniform \`priceMultiplier\` per model applies to the whole bill; component prices derivable from cost map
- No billing internals in public \`/models\`; \`usage.cost\`/\`search_context_size\` stripped from non-stream bodies (stream redaction + public cost exposure = separate later PR)
- Drops #11683's >200K long-context tiers (prod traffic: 7 req/1 user/30d); re-add when justified
- Comparison branches: \`claude/billing-scalar\`, \`codex/billing-adjustments-{scalar,map}\`

**Rollout (in order):**
1. Tinybird columns: \`tb --cloud deploy --check\` then deploy — STAGING workspace first (TB_TOKEN override), verify event round-trip, then PROD (both workspaces, #11127)
2. Merge, then sync main→production to deploy gen
3. Staging verify: grounded gemini-search → \`adjustment_costs\` populated; Perplexity stream → \`request_cost\` billed
4. Later, independent: merge gateway#7 + PORTKEY_COMMIT bump (#11703); until then non-stream Perplexity bills the exact pinned static fee
5. Monitor \`[billing]\` log lines + monthly invoice reconciliation vs \`sumMap(adjustment_costs)\`

Supersedes #11683

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Itemized receipts for the hive
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our billing engine to support itemized adjustments for advanced model features. Now, when you use Perplexity's search or Gemini's grounding, the exact costs are transparently calculated and applied.
gist.summary: Added declarative billing adjustments to the registry to accurately itemize Perplexity request fees and Gemini grounding costs (versions 2.5 and 3.x) during usage calculation.
gist.impact: API users leveraging Perplexity search or Gemini grounding will now have these specific provider fees transparently calculated and applied to their usage.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant, reviewing a long, itemized receipt (representing the new billing adjustments) coming out of a retro computer terminal, while the Nomnom creature eats the end of it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reviewing a long, itemized receipt printing from a retro computer terminal. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily munching on the end of the receipt paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
